title: bigfish: ripple
description: Expand vanilla fishing with new fish, attributes, collection records, bounties, QTE fishing, cooking, placeable food, exploration tools, and progression-focused aquatic gameplay.
body:
# BigFish: Ripple BigFish: Ripple is a Minecraft Forge mod focused on fishing, fish collection, cooking, and bounty-based progression. It expands vanilla fishing into a more rewarding survival activity. Explore different waters, catch fish with unique attributes, record your discoveries, cook fish-based meals, and complete bounty tasks for rewards. If vanilla fishing feels too simple, BigFish: Ripple gives fishing, aquatic exploration, and food crafting a stronger sense of progression. --- ## Features - More fish and aquatic life Adds new fish with different appearances, attributes, drops, and basic behaviors. - Fish attribute system Some fish have attributes such as weight, strength, stamina, perception, and luck. These attributes can affect fish records, bounty submissions, and reward checks. - Fish Ledger Record the fish you have caught, view fish data, and claim rewards based on your catches.

- Bounty Board Take on fishing, collection, treasure, and attribute-based bounty tasks to earn rewards.

- Exploration tools Use items such as the Gem Compass, Sea Shanty Harmonica, and Treasure Map to find target fish, discover treasure, and progress through bounty tasks. - QTE fishing minigame Makes fishing more interactive instead of simply waiting and reeling in. - Fish cooking and placeable food Cook different fish-based meals with special effects. Some advanced dishes can also be placed in the world as 3D food models and eaten step by step. --- ## Guidebook and Advancements BigFish: Ripple includes an in-game Patchouli guidebook that explains basic mechanics, item usage, and gameplay systems. --- ## Requirements Minecraft: 1.20.1 Mod Loader: Forge Environment: Required on both client and server Java: Java 17 Dependencies: GeckoLib, Patchouli --- ## Development Status BigFish: Ripple is playable and released as a normal release version. However, the mod is still under active development. Some systems, balance values, bounty rewards, task rules, and item functions may continue to change in future updates. ## Feedback & Bug Reports Found a bug, crash, compatibility issue, or have a suggestion? Please submit feedback here: [BigFish: Ripple Feedback Form](https://tally.so/r/LZ6A4l) You can upload logs to [mclo.gs](https://mclo.gs/) and paste the link in the form.
